displayName: Merged Chart Time Series by Window
description: Live telemetry rows for the labeller chart using an explicit time window plus context padding.
sql: SELECT * FROM ( WITH bounds AS ( SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM CAST(:start_time AS TIMESTAMP)) - (:context_minutes) * 60 AS s0, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM CAST(:end_time AS TIMESTAMP)) + (:context_minutes) * 60 AS s1 ) SELECT CAST(:well_name AS TEXT) || ':' || CAST(g.i AS TEXT) AS telemetry_point_id, CAST(:well_name AS TEXT) AS well_name, CAST(to_timestamp(b.s0 + (g.i / 299.0) * (b.s1 - b.s0)) AS TIMESTAMP) AS timestamp, 1 + CAST(FLOOR(g.i * 6.0 / 300.0) AS INTEGER) AS stage_num, 36.0 + 9.0 * sin(g.i / 14.0 + (length(CAST(:well_name AS TEXT)))) AS rate_slurry, 6200.0 + 550.0 * sin(g.i / 11.0 + (length(CAST(:well_name AS TEXT)))) AS press_mainline, 1 AS records_in_bucket, CASE WHEN :concentration_feature = 'inline' THEN 1.2 + 1.1 * sin(g.i / 18.0) WHEN :concentration_feature = 'target' THEN 1.6 + 1.0 * sin(g.i / 16.0) WHEN :concentration_feature = 'auger' THEN 1.4 + 1.2 * sin(g.i / 17.0) ELSE 1.5 + 1.3 * sin(g.i / 15.0) END AS selected_concentration, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS context_anchor FROM bounds b CROSS JOIN generate_series(0, 299) AS g(i) ) q
